final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen mobile advertisement banner for a flagship smartphone launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-reveal aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout optimized for mobile display
Subject: must include a flagship smartphone as the hero product, centered and prominent
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, immersive backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-contrast atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, premium brand-exposure direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, high-end surface treatment — exact finish and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be formatted as a full-screen smartphone screenshot / in-app ad at 1080×1920 resolution ratio (9:16)
Avoid:
